persona.name: Ravi Kumar
persona.role_summary: AWS Solutions Architect — AWS solution architecture, infrastructure as code, cloud cost optimization, and cloud security.

allocation_rationale: Ravi specializes in AWS architecture and IaC. Terraform-specialist is central to his IaC work; cloud-architect and hybrid-cloud support architecture design; security-auditor and backend-security-coder align with cloud security compliance. Observability and incident-responder support resilience posture.

skills.name: cloud-architect
skills.description: Design cloud-native solutions across AWS, Azure, and GCP with cost optimization and security. Masters serverless, containers, and infrastructure as code. Use PROACTIVELY for cloud architecture.

skills.name: hybrid-cloud-architect
skills.description: Design hybrid and multi-cloud architectures with seamless integration, data synchronization, and security. Masters cloud connectivity and edge computing. Use PROACTIVELY for hybrid cloud design.

skills.name: terraform-specialist
skills.description: Expert Terraform/OpenTofu specialist mastering advanced IaC automation, state management, and enterprise infrastructure patterns. Use PROACTIVELY for advanced IaC, state management, or infrastructure automation.

skills.name: kubernetes-architect
skills.description: Design and operate Kubernetes clusters with proper resource management, networking, and security. Masters Helm, operators, and service mesh. Use PROACTIVELY for Kubernetes architecture.

skills.name: deployment-engineer
skills.description: Automate deployment pipelines with zero-downtime strategies, rollback mechanisms, and infrastructure as code. Masters CI/CD and container orchestration. Use PROACTIVELY for deployment automation.

skills.name: network-engineer
skills.description: Design and troubleshoot network infrastructure with routing, security, and cloud networking. Masters VPNs, load balancing, and DNS. Use PROACTIVELY for network design.

skills.name: security-auditor
skills.description: Conduct security audits with vulnerability assessment, penetration testing guidance, and compliance review. Masters OWASP and security frameworks. Use PROACTIVELY for security audits.

skills.name: backend-security-coder
skills.description: Write secure backend code with authentication, authorization, and data protection built-in. Prevents injection, SSRF, and privilege escalation. Use PROACTIVELY for security-critical backend code.

skills.name: observability-engineer
skills.description: Implement comprehensive observability with metrics, logs, traces, and alerting. Masters Prometheus, Grafana, and distributed tracing. Use PROACTIVELY for observability design.

skills.name: database-admin
skills.description: Manage database systems with backup, recovery, replication, and security. Handles performance tuning and capacity planning. Use PROACTIVELY for database administration.

skills.name: incident-responder
skills.description: Manage production incidents with rapid diagnosis, mitigation, and communication. Masters incident command and post-mortem analysis. Use PROACTIVELY during incidents.

skills.name: mermaid-expert
skills.description: Create clear diagrams using Mermaid syntax for flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ERDs, and architecture visualizations. Use PROACTIVELY for diagram creation.

skills.name: devops-troubleshooter
skills.description: Diagnose and resolve DevOps issues across CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure, and monitoring systems. Masters incident response and system debugging. Use PROACTIVELY for DevOps troubleshooting.
